parameters.content:
## AI Sentiment-Triggered Polymarket Trader

Fetches recent posts from an RSS/Twitter feed, uses AI to analyze sentiment, matches to Polymarket markets, and generates trading signals.

**Setup:**
1. Set your RSS feed URL in the HTTP Request node (default: Nitter RSS for a Twitter search -- replace with your preferred source)
2. Configure an OpenAI API credential for the AI analysis node
3. Set up Telegram credentials for signal alerts
4. Adjust confidence threshold in the IF node (default: 0.7)

**How it works:**
- Polls RSS/Twitter feed every 15 minutes for new posts
- Extracts and cleans text content from the feed
- Searches Polymarket for matching active markets based on extracted keywords
- Gets live pricing (midpoint) for the top matching market
- Sends combined news + market data to OpenAI for BUY/SELL analysis
- Filters by confidence > 0.7 before generating signals
- Sends high-confidence signals to Telegram

**Risk Warning:** This template uses `validateOnly=true` by default -- it will NOT place real orders. Remove `validateOnly` only after thorough testing with real funds you can afford to lose. AI signals are not financial advice.
